hero.subheadline: Connecting international capital with premium real estate and expertise.

about.headline: AMP Empire, Architects of Global Capital Corridors
about.body: Founded in 2018, our mission is to elevate real estate service standards to an unreachable level.
about.bodyExtended: We bridge the gap between international capital and premium real estate, providing expert advisory and management services.
about.history: AMP EMPIRE (ALEKSANDRA BRZEZIŃSKA) is a registered institutional hub based in Warsaw, Poland.

services.headline: Service Pillars
services.subtitle: Bridging international capital through three distinct professional sectors.

realEstate.title: Real Estate & Property Management
realEstate.p1: Property Brokerage: Licensed intermediation for residential and commercial assets.
realEstate.p2: Property Management: Comprehensive management on behalf of owners.

consulting.title: Strategic Advisory & Consulting
consulting.p1: Business Consultancy: Strategic advice on business operations and optimization.
consulting.p2: Capital Corridors: Strategic planning for international capital movement.

hospitality.title: Hospitality & Lifestyle Assets
hospitality.p1: Restaurant Operations: Management and consulting for gastronomy assets.
hospitality.p2: Accommodation Services: Management of short-term stays and lodging facilities.

courses.headline: Expert Training Modules
courses.subtitle: High-performance training for professionals in the premium real estate market.

sales.title: SALES
sales.description: Foundational and advanced property sales strategies.

objections.title: OBJECTIONS
objections.description: Advanced strategies for handling client resistance.
